text.title: Writing Implementation Plans Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Does the WBS yield ≥3 atomic tasks with non-trivial sequencing?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology; produce implementation-plan.md (Draft) and validate it.
skip the plan; author TASK files directly via template-task.
defer; wait until design is Accepted before starting the plan.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, Skip-If clear → design.md is Accepted → WBS yields 3+ tasks with sequencing → run the planning phase, emit implementation-plan.md (Draft) for owner review.
